title: Enderium Tools
description: Adds enderium tools which are an slight upgrade from netherite.
body:
This mod adds "Enderium" which can be used to upgrade netherite tools. This mod was made as a simple way to get tools past netherite.

## Crafting
- **Enderium ingots** are made by crafting netherite ingots with diamonds and other end ingredients such as ender peals
- **Enderium Upgrade Templates** are made with normal upgrade templates and other end ingredients like end stone
- **Enderium tools** are made by Upgrading netherite tools in a smithing table with an enderium         upgrade template and enderium ingot.
- I recommend JEI to see the recipes.

## This mod adds:
- Enderium Sword
- Enderium Pickaxe
- Enderium Shovel
- Enderium Axe
- Enderium Hoe
- Enderium Upgrade Template
- Enderium Ingot
- swirlz(unrelated)
